items.name: blast-ppv-prediction
items.description: This project develops a comprehensive Machine Learning framework for predicting Peak Particle Velocity (PPV) from controlled blasting operations in Indian coal mines. It extends the traditional CMRI empirical formula with modern ML models, SHAP explainability, multi-output prediction, and a real-time safety intelligence dashboard.

items.name: PhaseLearner
items.description: PhaseLearner is a modular machine-learning framework for extracting phase structure from many-body simulation data. Designed for DQMC and lattice models, it implements dimensionality reduction, latent-space analysis, and physics-informed deep learning models to locate critical parameters, identify symmetry breaking, and characterize emergent order.

items.name: The-Real-Time-Financial-Stock-Dashboard
items.description: A comprehensive financial intelligence system that integrates a Random Forest machine learning pipeline with real-time data visualization. The engine features a custom backtesting framework that achieved a 0.66 precision score during the 2022 bear market stress test, demonstrating high reliability in volatile environments.

items.name: privacy-preserving-cloud-ml-models-
items.description: Framework to mitigate the privacy risks inherent in centralized cloud-based machine learning. While cloud infrastructures provide the scalability and computational power necessary for training advanced models, the traditional practice of aggregating sensitive raw data on central servers creates significant vulnerabilities to data breaches.

items.description: This project implements a data engineering and machine learning pipeline designed to detect post-earnings price anomalies by integrating free multi-source financial data. It uses an XGBoost regressor optimized via Optuna within a rigorous walk-forward framework to prevent data leakage and ensure realistic backtesting performance.

Include sistem multi-rol și management de date.
